subject: Houndour, a small dark canine Pokemon with orange markings, gripping a stick in its jaws
description: A small dark canine creature stands alertly on a rocky elevated ledge, a long stick or branch clenched firmly in its jaws. The creature has a dark body with orange accent markings and white paws. Behind it, warm amber and orange sky light illuminates tall desert rock formations. The setting has a dry, rugged quality — dusty orange cliffs and stone ground. The creature's posture is grounded and determined, front legs planted wide, head held level with the stick extending forward.
foreground: dark canine creature standing on rocky surface holding a stick in its mouth
background: warm amber sky with rocky desert cliffs
emotion: alert and defiant, weight forward, gripping the stick with purpose
